chunks.text: CYBEAR @ Berkeley | SPONSORS HOME ABOUT SPONSORS GEN CYBER CONTACT US FAQ CYBEAR is generously funded by our partners: GenCyber The GenCyber program provides summer cybersecurity camp experiences for students and teachers at the K-12 level. The goals

students and teachers at the K-12 level. The goals of the program are to help all students understand correct and safe on-line behavior, increase diversity and interest in cybersecurity and careers in the cybersecurity workforce of the Nation, and im
